{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Zenith Era fire
| introduced = lh-03-the-knight
}}

== The Knight ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-03-the-knight|[[Zenith Era fire]] can be used to blast enemies from their thrones.<ref name="lh-03-the-knight-c8">''The Knight'', chapter 8</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Knight]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
